reasoning: FIDE publishes its official rating lists on the 1st of every month, and the Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' mirrors these monthly publications. The rating for any player shown on March 15 will be identical to the rating shown on March 22, as both dates fall within the same month and therefore rely on the same March 1st list. To achieve a 1% increase, Kosteniuk's rating would need to climb by nearly 25 points between March 15 and March 22 specifically on this Wikipedia page, which would require either an unprecedented mid-month official update by FIDE or prolonged vandalism on the page. Therefore, the probability of her Wikipedia-listed rating being >=1% higher on March 22 than March 15 is effectively zero.
